title: pilea depressa
intro: Pilea depressa, also known as the flatstem pilea, is a type of plant belonging to the Urticaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilea depressa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
